title: Fix comparison snapshot picker
summary: Repository comparison now uses a searchable endpoint picker instead of native snapshot dropdowns, and comparison surfaces use theme tokens so dark mode remains readable.
userVisibleChange: Users can pick Earlier and Later snapshots by activating an endpoint and searching snapshot titles, ids, types, or dates; the comparison board is more compact and no longer becomes black-on-black in dark mode.

risks.title: Search result ranking is simple substring matching, so fuzzy matching could improve very large histories later.

decisions.title: Use a capped searchable result list instead of native dropdowns so large snapshot histories remain usable.
Keep comparison output stacked within the repository page instead of using a viewport-based side rail that compresses panels.
Use theme token surfaces for comparison panels instead of hardcoded white or slate colors.

validation.command: npm run build in ui passed
Playwright verified /repositories/eve Compare tab search picker, typed filtering, and light/dark rendering.
